objective: 及早發現漏打卡或異常工時
rule_logic: Identify missing punch records and shifts exceeding configured daily hour caps
exceptions_handling: Notify employee and line manager; unresolved cases escalate to HR Ops within 2 business days
test_procedure: Sample 20 exception cases and verify closure timeliness

control_name: 加班費倍率結薪前驗證
objective: 防止加班費少計或誤計
rule_logic: Recalculate overtime premium by day type and compare with payroll output before release
exceptions_handling: Block payroll release and open correction ticket
test_procedure: Monthly sample recalculation on 25 employees with overtime

control_name: 特休結轉與到期提醒控制
objective: 確保特休計算與到期處理符合制度
rule_logic: Compute leave entitlement and expiry schedule per tenure and notify employees before expiry
exceptions_handling: Cases without delivery receipt are escalated to HR Operations
test_procedure: Quarterly sample review of 30 leave balance records

control_name: 資遣程序法定時點檢核
objective: 避免資遣流程違反法定通知與給付時點
rule_logic: Validate notice period and severance amount before termination approval
exceptions_handling: Route to Legal and block final approval
test_procedure: Review all termination cases monthly for legal timeline compliance

control_name: 勞健保加退保時效控制
objective: 確保加退保申報時效與資料正確
rule_logic: Match employee lifecycle events with insurance submissions and flag overdue or mismatched records
exceptions_handling: Escalate overdue cases to Benefits Lead and Finance
test_procedure: Weekly review of all lifecycle events and submission receipts

control_name: 性騷申訴案件時程控制
objective: 確保申訴受理與調查程序符合規範時程
rule_logic: Track case milestones against policy SLA and escalate breaches
exceptions_handling: Immediate escalation to compliance committee chair
test_procedure: Monthly full-population review of all open and closed cases

control_name: 人資敏感個資存取覆核
objective: 降低未授權存取員工敏感個資風險
rule_logic: Detect privileged access outside approved role matrix and require documented justification
exceptions_handling: Suspend elevated access and open privacy incident workflow
test_procedure: Sample privileged access records and validate approval evidence
